name: LOXSAT 1
window: Finestra NET; data e orario da ricontrollare
site: Unknown Pad, Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1, Mahia Peninsula, New Zealand
landing: Recupero del primo stadio non previsto nell'agenda
summary: LOXSAT 1 is a demonstration satellite of a complete cryogenic oxygen fluid management system in orbit, developed by Eta Space and sponsored by NASA's Tipping Point program. The system will be integrated on a Rocket Lab Photon-LEO satellite bus and collect critical cryogenic fluid management data in orbit for 9 months, demonstrating capabilities of in-space cryogenic storage and transferal.
